name: Harbor
summary: TypeScript agent control plane — scheduler, compaction, isolation, session tracking, and hypervisor primitives (spawn / budget / gate / audit / evict). Installed by other coding agents to gate their own permissions and resource use.
features: Room-scoped capability isolation for agent sessions
Hypervisor primitives: spawn, budget, gate, audit, evict
Append-only audit log of capability denials
Skill pool organization and per-room index generation
MCP server + per-agent install config emission (6 agent targets + Pi)
users: AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, opencode, Codex, Gemini, Goose) and the operator who installs Harbor on their machine
